stages.label: Preflight production seal API
stages.detail: Synapse private key: Set SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY to a funded 0x-prefixed 32-byte Filecoin/Synapse private key. Server upload token: Set FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN to a strong bearer token before exposing POST /seal. Browser token matches server: Set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN to the same value expected by FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN in the deployed seal API. Persistent proof store: Set FILECOIN_PROOF_STORE_PATH to a durable mounted file path and ensure its parent directory is writable. Restricted CORS origin: Set ALLOW_ORIGIN to the deployed HTTPS app origin, not '*'. Browser seal endpoint: Set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API to the deployed HTTPS /seal endpoint, or set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1 when the production API is mounted at /seal on the app origin.

stages.label: Build seal target payloads
stages.detail: Build deterministic production record and mode payloads before submitting them to the seal API.

stages.label: Seal production proof targets
stages.detail: POST the record target and all 4 mode targets to /seal?async=1, poll /jobs/:id, then verify /verify and /proof read-back.

stages.label: Verify Filecoin read-back
stages.detail: Verify health, contract readiness, record CID read-back and every required mode CID/hash pair.

nextAction: Preflight production seal API: set Synapse private key, Server upload token, Browser token matches server, Persistent proof store, Restricted CORS origin, Browser seal endpoint first.
copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent Filecoin production bootstrap
Mode: plan
Stages: 0/4 ready or done
Missing env: Synapse private key, Server upload token, Browser token matches server, Persistent proof store, Restricted CORS origin, Browser seal endpoint, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, production-ready seal API, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API or VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1 with VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_PAYLOAD_HASH, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASHES
Next action: Preflight production seal API: set Synapse private key, Server upload token, Browser token matches server, Persistent proof store, Restricted CORS origin, Browser seal endpoint first.
Commands:
- bun run filecoin:api:check
- bun run seal:production-targets -- --dry-run
- bun run seal:production-targets
- bun run doctor:filecoin
Stages:
- Preflight production seal API [blocked]
  command: bun run filecoin:api:check
  execute: bun run filecoin:api:check
  requires: SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, FILECOIN_PROOF_STORE_PATH, ALLOW_ORIGIN, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API or VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL when VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1
  missing: Synapse private key, Server upload token, Browser token matches server, Persistent proof store, Restricted CORS origin, Browser seal endpoint
  outputs: production-ready /health response
  detail: Synapse private key: Set SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY to a funded 0x-prefixed 32-byte Filecoin/Synapse private key. Server upload token: Set FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN to a strong bearer token before exposing POST /seal. Browser token matches server: Set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN to the same value expected by FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN in the deployed seal API. Persistent proof store: Set FILECOIN_PROOF_STORE_PATH to a durable mounted file path and ensure its parent directory is writable. Restricted CORS origin: Set ALLOW_ORIGIN to the deployed HTTPS app origin, not '*'. Browser seal endpoint: Set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API to the deployed HTTPS /seal endpoint, or set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1 when the production API is mounted at /seal on the app origin.
- Build seal target payloads [blocked]
  command: bun run seal:production-targets -- --dry-run
  execute: bun run seal:production-targets -- --dry-run
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, KICKOFF_SEED_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_SEED_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: record payload hash, mode payload hashes, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS
  detail: Build deterministic production record and mode payloads before submitting them to the seal API.
- Seal production proof targets [blocked]
  command: bun run seal:production-targets
  execute: bun run seal:production-targets
  requires: production-ready seal API, VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, KICKOFF_SEED_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_SEED_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  missing: production-ready seal API, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_PAYLOAD_HASH, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASHES
  detail: POST the record target and all 4 mode targets to /seal?async=1, poll /jobs/:id, then verify /verify and /proof read-back.
- Verify Filecoin read-back [blocked]
  command: bun run doctor:filecoin
  execute: bun run doctor:filecoin
  requires: VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API or VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_PAYLOAD_HASH, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASHES
  missing: VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API or VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1 with VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_PAYLOAD_HASH, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASHES
  outputs: Filecoin production evidence
  detail: Verify health, contract readiness, record CID read-back and every required mode CID/hash pair.
